description: Users can authenticate against the platform with email + password from the marketing header or the deep-linked /login route. Session persists via HttpOnly cookie. Account locks after 5 failed attempts in 15 minutes.

background.text: a registered user exists with email "casey@example.com" and password "correct horse battery"

scenarios.name: Successful login redirects to dashboard within 2 seconds

steps.text: I open the marketing home page
I click "Sign in" in the header
I enter "casey@example.com" and "correct horse battery"
I submit the login form
I am redirected to /dashboard within 2 seconds
an HttpOnly __Host-session cookie is set

scenarios.name: Wrong password shows a generic error without leaking account existence

steps.text: I am on the /login page
I submit "casey@example.com" with the wrong password "hunter2"
the inline error reads "Email or password is incorrect"
the password field is cleared and the email field is preserved

scenarios.name: Unknown email shows the same generic error

steps.text: I am on the /login page
I submit "ghost@nowhere.example" with any password
the same generic error "Email or password is incorrect" is shown
no signal of account existence is leaked in the response or headers

scenarios.name: Five failed attempts in 15 minutes locks the account

steps.text: I have made four consecutive failed login attempts
I submit a fifth failed attempt within 15 minutes
the inline error reads "Account temporarily locked"
a "Reset password" link is shown

scenarios.name: Empty email or password is caught client-side

steps.text: I am on the /login page
I submit the form with empty fields
inline validation "Email is required" and "Password is required" appears
the form is not posted to the server

scenarios.name: Authenticated session persists across a hard reload

steps.text: I am signed in and on /dashboard
I hard-reload the page
I remain on /dashboard with my user displayed in the header
